name: greenhouse
description: Reads and writes documented Greenhouse Harvest REST API resources through the declarative connector engine.

risk.read: external Greenhouse Harvest API read of candidates, applications, jobs, offers, users, and other documented resources
risk.write: external Greenhouse Harvest API mutations including candidate, application, job, office, department, tag, and user changes
risk.approval: required for every write action; destructive and identity-changing actions are marked confirm: destructive
